svg.title: Every Terminal-Bench 2.1 benchmark rep cost from results.jsonl
svg.desc: Scatter plot of all 885 individual runs from benchmarks/harbor/results/cost_vs_savings.jsonl. Each dot is one recorded rep. Baseline totals $485.02 and Atelier totals $463.15.
svg.text: RAW RESULTS.JSONL - EVERY DOT IS ONE RECORDED REP
Terminal-Bench 2.1: Every Recorded Rep, Baseline vs Atelier
885 real Terminal-Bench 2.1 runs: 13 reps per arm per task. Solid dots passed; hollow dots failed. Median lines show the curve.
85 tasks, sorted by baseline median rep cost
